stories.story: "What do we have for the contestant on 'The Price Is Right'?" "A brand-new car!" "Whoops, that wasn't supposed to happen." On Thursday's edition of "The Price Is Right", model Manuela Arbelaez accidentally revealed the correct answer to a guessing game for a new Hyundai Sonata. Host Drew Carey couldn't stop laughing.
key_facts: Thursday's edition of 'The Price Is Right'
Manuela Arbelaez accidentally revealed the answer for a Hyundai Sonata
explicit_unknowns: The reason why the answer was revealed

stories.story: Host Drew Carey exulted on "The Price Is Right", "Congratulations! Manuela Arbelaez just gave you a car!" Model Manuela Arbelaez was mortified and attempted to hide behind the display. Manuela Arbelaez tweeted later that everything turned out OK.
key_facts: Manuela Arbelaez was mortified and hid
Manuela Arbelaez tweeted that everything turned out OK
explicit_unknowns: The full text of the tweet

stories.story: It's been a busy week for "The Price Is Right". On Wednesday, former host Bob Barker, 91, showed up to run "The Price Is Right".
key_facts: Wednesday's edition of 'The Price Is Right'
Bob Barker, 91, returned to run the show
explicit_unknowns: The reason Bob Barker returned to the show
